eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Ouray, CO; at 8:00 PM on JUN 27, 2026 Effective until 2:00 AM JUN 28, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a public safety message from Ouray County Emergency Management. There is a MANDATORY EVACUATION ORDER for Pecks trailer park and Red Stone Road area due to a wildfire in the area. Collect important documents and medications and LEAVE NOW. Evacuate to the Ouray County 4H Center. This is a public safety message from Ouray County Emergency Management. There is a MANDATORY EVACUATION ORDER for Pecks trailer park and Red Stone Road area due to a wildfire in the area. Collect important documents and medications and LEAVE NOW. Evacuate to the Ouray County 4H Center.
